Grab a seat.
Double your cheeks.

Lahore's premier Gen Z Izakaya-style Asian food hotspot. Bold flavors, main character energy, no cap. Let's feast.

The Menu But Make It Meme 🔥

POV: You said just one bao

"Narrator: it was not one bao"

Chicken Bao Buns

Saucy gochujang fried chicken in steamed buns topped with cucumber, cilantro and served with chosen sauce.

Diet starts tmrw. (again)

"after seeing our katsu"

Katsu Sandwich

Rs.1200

Crispy glazed chicken, tonkatsu sauce, benishoga salad in a toasted Japanese milk bread.

The internet was RIGHT ✓

"double cheek bowl hits different"

Double Cheek Bowl

Rs.1850

Fried rice with sautéed mushroom in sesame relish and chicken karaage.

✦
✦
🍱
🍜

Built different.
On purpose. ✦

We didn't come to Lahore to build just another generic restaurant. Double Cheeked Up is a statement. Rooted in the rich traditions of the Japanese Izakaya, we merge casual street vibes with top-tier culinary craftsmanship.

Whether you're here for the late-night gyoza cravings, the aesthetically pleasing bao buns, or just to vibe under the neon lights, we make sure every single bite passes the vibe check.

Come See For Yourself
11K Insta Fam
220+ Bao Served Daily
4 PM Doors Open
∞ Main Character Vibes
Feedbacks

Real ones from real ones 🫶

ZA
Zainab Ali
@zainab_ali
🐦

bro i walked past DCU not even hungry and somehow ended up inside ordering 3 plates. the bao buns literally unlocked something in my brain 🧠

❤️ 847
💬 42
HM
Hamza Malik
@hamza_m
🐦

the owner of DCU remembered my name from last time and came to say hi mid-service. that's it. that's the whole review. 10/10 food AND people 🫶

❤️ 1.2K
💬 88
MK
Mirza Khan
@mirza_k
🐦

been to DCU 4 times this month and i'm not even sorry about it. the crispy rice tuna is sending me to another dimension fr fr no cap 😭

❤️ 2.1K
💬 154
Our Plates

Full Izakaya Menu

01

Katsu Sandwich

Rs.1200

"Crispy chicken katsu. Absolute main character energy. 🥪"

Crispy glazed chicken, tonkatsu sauce, benishoga salad in a toasted Japanese milk bread.

02

Crispy Tenders

Rs.700

"Better than your ex's behavior, fr fr. 🍗"

24-hour brined chicken fried in Korean-style tempura batter.

03

Gochujang Tenders

Rs.900

"Ask for spicy if you want to feel something. 🌶️"

24-hour brined chicken in Korean-style tempura batter dipped in gochujang sauce. Ask to make it spicy!

04

Chicken Bao Buns

Rs.1100

"Steamed pillows of joy. Sleeping on these is a crime. 🥟"

Saucy gochujang fried chicken in steamed buns topped with cucumber, cilantro and served with chosen sauce.

05

Beef Bao Buns

Rs.1200

"Steamed buns + beef patty = burger's cooler cousin. 🍔"

Steamed fluffy buns filled with beef patties, topped with cheese, served with your choice of house-made sauce.

06

Chicken Karaage

Rs.1300

"Karaage chicken tossed in fish caramel. It's a vibe. 🥢"

Fried chicken tossed in sweet chilli and fish caramel sauce. Topped with vegetable escabeche.

07

Double Cheek Bowl

Rs.1850

"Fried rice so good it makes you want to cancel your plans. 🍚"

Fried rice with sautéed mushroom in sesame relish and chicken karaage.

01

Korean Fried Chicken Burger

Rs.1100

"Crispy gochujang chicken. A burger that rizzes you up. 🍔"

Crispy fried chicken dipped in gochujang sauce, and soft toasted potato buns. Served with fries.

Sauce: Kimchi Emulsion / Garlic Mayo / Honey Sriracha / Chipotle Mayo
Topping: Kimchi Slaw / Spicy Pickled Cucumbers / Cabbage Slaw
Extras (+Rs.120): Caramelized Onions / Caramelized Mushrooms / Creamy Mushrooms / Cheese Slice
02

Beef Burger

Rs.1200

"Juicy beef patty. Respect the classics, no cap. 🥩"

Juicy 200g 80/20 beef patty topped with cheese, served in soft toasted potato buns. Served with fries.

Sauce: Kimchi Emulsion / Garlic Mayo / Honey Sriracha / Chipotle Mayo
Topping: Kimchi Slaw / Spicy Pickled Cucumbers / Cabbage Slaw
Extras (+Rs.120): Caramelized Onions / Caramelized Mushrooms / Creamy Mushrooms / Cheese Slice
01

Farmers Salad

Rs.950

"Eating greens so my body doesn't shut down. 🥬"

Local greens and veggies, corn, chickpeas with a side of creamy gochujang tahini dressing.

Add-ons: Grilled Chicken (+Rs.150) / Beef (+Rs.350)

02

Halloumi Salad

Rs.1200

"Halloumi cheese: the steak of the vegetarian world. 🧀"

Salad bouquet, onion, tomato and cucumber mignonette with seared halloumi on a bed of tomato vinaigrette topped with cilantro and basil oil.

01

Regular Fries

Rs.350

"Just fries. Simple, clean, delicious. 🍟"

Crispy golden classical fries, salted to perfection.

02

Togarashi Fries

Rs.400

"Spiced fries. Regular fries, but they went to private school. ✨"

Crispy fries seasoned with spicy Japanese Togarashi pepper seasoning.

03

Garlic Fries

Rs.450

"Social distancing, but make it tasty. 🧄"

Crispy fries tossed in aromatic garlic herbs and butter dressing.

04

Potato Wedges

Rs.400

"Potato wedges: thick cut, thick thighs, save lives. 🥔"

Thick, oven-baked seasoned potato wedges served with dipping sauce.

01

Kkwabaegi

Rs.600

"Twisted donuts. Like my life decisions but sweet. 🍩"

Twisted Korean donuts served with chocolate ganache or salted coffee caramel dipping sauces.

02

Matilda Cake

Rs.900

"So moist it should be illegal. Moist cake arc. 🍰"

Moist chocolate sponge layered with rich, premium chocolate ganache.

01

Peach Seltzer

Rs.400

"A bubbly peach drink. Very demure, very mindful. 🍑"

Refreshing carbonated water infused with natural peach essences.

02

Spa Drink

Rs.650

"Spa drink. Cucumber water but it actually has flavor. 🥒"

Premium infused botanical water to keep you refreshed and Zen.

03

Orgeat Basil Lemonade

Rs.700

"Basil and lemonade. Fresh and aesthetic. 🍋"

Zesty sweet lemonade styled with sweet almond orgeat syrup and fresh basil leaves.

04

Yuzu Passion

Rs.850

"Yuzu + Passionfruit. Pure main character energy. 🍹"

Japanese citrus yuzu blend combined with aromatic passionfruit pulp.

05

Cookies and Cream Shake

Rs.650

"Cookies and cream. Cheat day starts now. 🍪"

Creamy ice cream shake loaded with chocolate cookies crumble.

06

Salted Caramel Coffee Shake

Rs.650

"Caffeine + Caramel. Sleeping is for the weak. ☕"

Rich double shot espresso blended with vanilla shake and salted caramel drizzles.

07

Soft Drinks

Rs.120

"Coke / Sprite. The emotional support drink. 🥤"

Standard choice of Coke, Diet Coke, Sprite, or Fanta canned sodas.

🔥
